news.t: From Field to Shelf: The ETF Response to Volatile Food Prices

holdings.infoBox: FTXG is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Archer-Daniels-Midland Company stock at 9.50%, Mondelez International at 8.49%, The Coca-Cola Company at 8.28%, The Kraft Heinz Company at 8.13%, and PepsiCo at 7.24%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Food & Beverage ETF (FTXG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq US Smart Food & Beverage index. The fund follows a liquidity-selected, multi-factor-weighted index of US food & beverage companies. FTXG was launched on Sep 20, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Nasdaq US Smart Food & Beverage Index

data.title: From Field to Shelf: The ETF Response to Volatile Food Prices
data.text: As we venture toward the halfway point of 2026, the headline narrative for consumer food prices is one of stabilizing moderation. However, this masks a sharp structural divergence under the surface th...
